description: Crystal Raiders Patch 2 (7 February 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Lethal Crystal League stats are now in the Archive section of a player’s personal stats

sections.searchable_text: Changes Lethal Crystal League stats are now in the Archive section of a player’s personal stats

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Mimicking an ability now reduces the mimicked ability cooldown by 20% (except for Magic Shock)

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Mimic (all Arcane Staffs) Mimicking an ability now reduces the mimicked ability cooldown by 20% (except for Magic Shock)

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

subitems.text: Snowball now knocks enemies into the air for 0.8s
Removed the second activation; Snowball now only explodes when colliding with terrain and can’t be activated manually
Removed the Stun Effect of the Explosion

subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) Snowball Speed: 8.5m/s → 12m/s Snowball now knocks enemies into the air for 0.8s Removed the second activation; Snowball now only explodes when colliding with terrain and can’t be activated manually Explosion Radius: 4m → 5m Removed the Stun Effect of the Explosion

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Now for every enemy player hit, the ability cooldown is now reduced by 12% (stacks up to 3 times)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Rising Blow (all Quarterstaffs) Damage: 50 → 75 Now for every enemy player hit, the ability cooldown is now reduced by 12% (stacks up to 3 times)

subsections.heading: Mounts

subitems.text: Caster is now invincible during the sprint

subsections.searchable_text: Mounts The Other Side (Spectral Bonehorse) Invisibility Duration: 5s → 10s Unstoppable Sprint (Rageclaw) Duration: 6s → 5s Caster is now invincible during the sprint

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Mimic (all Arcane Staffs) Frost Staffs Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) Quarterstaffs Rising Blow (all Quarterstaffs) Armors Mist Cloud (Mistwalker Jacket) Mounts The Other Side (Spectral Bonehorse) Unstoppable Sprint (Rageclaw)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where status of Siphoning Mages on World Map Territory UI was not updated for hostile territories
Fixed issue where Ent’s Blessing (Ancient Ent) VFX was sometimes invisible
Fixed issue where ‘Mists Closing’ timer displayed longer than intended when entering a Mists region or Knightfall Abbey
Fixed issue where trading was not possible when two players requested trade simultaneously
Additional minor graphical, UI, terrain, and localization fixes

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Fixed issue where status of Siphoning Mages on World Map Territory UI was not updated for hostile territories Fixed issue where Ent’s Blessing (Ancient Ent) VFX was sometimes invisible Fixed issue where ‘Mists Closing’ timer displayed longer than intended when entering a Mists region or Knightfall Abbey Fixed issue where trading was not possible when two players requested trade simultaneously Additional minor graphical, UI, terrain, and localization fixes
